heading: Construction of subchapters I and II; “individual with mental illness” defined
label: 10851 Construction of subchapters I and II; “individual with mental illness” defined
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was redesignated by , , .Section 10802(3) of this titlesection 10802(4) of this titlePub. L. 102–173, § 4(1)105 Stat. 1217Nov. 27, 1991

Amendments1991—, substituted “individuals with mental illness” for “mentally ill individuals” in subsec. (a) and “individual with mental illness” for “mentally ill individual” in subsec. (b).Pub. L. 102–173
amendments: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was redesignated by , , .Section 10802(3) of this titlesection 10802(4) of this titlePub. L. 102–173, § 4(1)105 Stat. 1217Nov. 27, 1991

Amendments1991—, substituted “individuals with mental illness” for “mentally ill individuals” in subsec. (a) and “individual with mental illness” for “mentally ill individual” in subsec. (b).Pub. L. 102–173

children.label: a
children.text: Subchapters I and II shall not be construed as establishing any new rights for individuals with mental illness.

children.label: b
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “individual with mental illness” has the same meaning as in section 10802(3) of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
